summary: Despite acknowledging plant pollens' role in allergies and protein-based allergic reactions, none of the retrieved documents specifically address olive tree pollen or its proteome. Therefore, based on available literature, it can be concluded that the olive tree pollen proteome has not been studied.\boxed{\text{No}}
